$comment: PERMANENT. The store's information architecture — collections and navigation. Version-controlled, re-runnable on any store. Product rows live in sample-products.dummy.csv. Imagery lives in assets.dummy.json (dev) or assets.client.json (real).
$sourceComment: Derived from the client's SRS (Software Requirements Specification, Fazarim Website): §6.1 Sitemap, §6.2 Navigation Structure, §8.1.8 Product Categories, §8.1.12 Shop by Skin Concern. Fazarim sells SKINCARE, HAIR CARE and BODY CARE — not makeup. Do not reintroduce makeup, accessories or gifts categories.

collections.title: Sale
collections.description: Real discounts on the skincare, hair care and body care you already use. Stock is limited and prices return to normal when the promotion ends.
collections.seoDescription: Discounted Fazarim skincare, hair care and body care. Free delivery on orders over Rs. 10,000 across Pakistan.

collections.title: New Arrivals
collections.description: The newest additions to the Fazarim range. Every formula is dermatologist approved and tested for daily use before it reaches this page.
collections.seoDescription: New Fazarim skincare, hair care and body care products. Dermatologist approved, cruelty-free, made in Pakistan.

collections.title: Best Sellers
collections.description: The products our customers reorder most. If you are not sure where to start, start here.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim best sellers — the most popular skincare, hair care and body care products. Free delivery over Rs. 10,000.

collections.title: Skincare
collections.description: Serums, moisturisers, cleansers and sunscreen built around ingredients that do the work — vitamin C, niacinamide, hyaluronic acid. Formulated for Pakistani skin and Pakistani weather, and gentle enough for daily use.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim skincare — serums, moisturisers, cleansers and SPF. Dermatologist approved, sulphate-free, cruelty-free. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Hair Care
collections.description: Sulphate-free shampoos, medicated shampoos and hair oils for hair fall, dandruff, frizz and damage. Safe for coloured and chemically treated hair.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim hair care — sulphate-free and medicated shampoos, hair oils for hair fall and dandruff. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Body Care
collections.description: Bathing soaps, medicated soaps, body wash and moisturising lotions. Everyday care that cleans without stripping your skin.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim body care — bathing and medicated soaps, body wash, moisturising lotions. Cruelty-free, delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Kits & Bundles
collections.description: Complete routines in one box, priced below buying each product separately. The simplest way to start if you are new to a category.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim skincare and hair care kits and bundles. Complete routines at a lower price. Free delivery over Rs. 10,000.

collections.title: Serums
collections.description: Concentrated actives at concentrations that actually do something — vitamin C for tone, niacinamide for oil and breakouts.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim face serums — vitamin C and niacinamide. Dermatologist approved, cruelty-free. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Moisturizers
collections.description: Hydration that lasts the day without a heavy finish. Fragrance-free options for sensitive skin.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim moisturisers for face and body. Fragrance-free, dermatologist approved. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Cleansers
collections.description: Sulphate-free cleansers that remove oil and sunscreen without stripping your skin barrier. pH balanced.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim face cleansers — sulphate-free and pH balanced. Gentle enough for daily use. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Sunscreen
collections.description: Broad-spectrum protection with no white cast, light enough to wear every day. The single most useful step in any routine.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim sunscreen SPF 50 PA+++. Broad-spectrum, no white cast, lightweight. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Shampoo
collections.description: Sulphate-free and medicated shampoos for dandruff, damage and daily washing. Safe for coloured hair.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim shampoo — sulphate-free and anti-dandruff medicated formulas. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Hair Oil
collections.description: Cold-pressed oils for the scalp and lengths — argan for frizz and shine, rosemary and black seed for hair fall.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim hair oils — argan, rosemary and black seed for hair fall, frizz and damage. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Soaps
collections.description: Bathing and medicated bars. Glycerin-rich for sensitive skin, or antibacterial for body breakouts.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim soaps — gentle bathing bars and medicated antibacterial soap. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Lotions
collections.description: Fast-absorbing body moisturisers with shea and niacinamide. Non-greasy, made for daily use.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim body lotions with shea butter and niacinamide. Non-greasy, 24-hour moisture. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Body Wash
collections.description: Creamy, sulphate-free body wash that cleans without leaving skin tight.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim body wash — sulphate-free, with glycerin and shea. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.$concernComment: SRS §8.1.12 Shop by Skin Concern — concern-tagged listings, not browse categories.
collections.title: Acne
collections.description: Targeted care for breakout-prone skin — niacinamide to regulate oil, medicated cleansing for body breakouts. Introduce one product at a time.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim products for acne and breakout-prone skin. Niacinamide serum, medicated soap. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Dry Skin
collections.description: Hydration that holds — hyaluronic acid, glycerin and shea, in formulas that do not strip what they are meant to replace.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim products for dry skin — moisturisers, body lotion, gentle cleansers. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Oily Skin
collections.description: Oil control without the tightness. Sulphate-free cleansing and niacinamide, not harsh stripping.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim products for oily skin — niacinamide serum, sulphate-free cleanser. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Sensitive Skin
collections.description: Fragrance-free, minimal formulas for skin that reacts easily. Patch test anything new, even from this page.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim products for sensitive skin — fragrance-free moisturisers, gentle cleansers and soap. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Pigmentation
collections.description: For uneven tone and dark spots: vitamin C to brighten, and daily SPF — because sun exposure undoes the rest.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim products for pigmentation and uneven skin tone — vitamin C serum and SPF 50. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Anti-Aging
collections.description: Antioxidants and sun protection. Not a promise to turn back time — the honest tools that help.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim anti-ageing products — vitamin C serum and broad-spectrum SPF 50. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Hair Fall
collections.description: Scalp-focused care for thinning and breakage. Rosemary and black seed oil, massaged in regularly.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim products for hair fall — rosemary and black seed scalp oil. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Dandruff
collections.description: Medicated care for flaking and an itchy scalp — ketoconazole and zinc pyrithione, used two to three times a week.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim anti-dandruff products — medicated shampoo with ketoconazole and zinc pyrithione. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Frizzy Hair
collections.description: Smoothing oils that weigh nothing. For humidity, flyaways and rough ends.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim products for frizzy hair — argan hair oil and sulphate-free shampoo. Delivered across Pakistan.

collections.title: Damaged Hair
collections.description: Repair for heat, colour and chemical damage. Sulphate-free washing plus oils that rebuild the lengths.
collections.seoDescription: Fazarim products for damaged hair — repair shampoo and argan oil. Safe for coloured hair. Delivered across Pakistan.

$retireComment: Handles to DELETE from the store — off-brand leftovers, run via `npm run prune`. Deletion is irreversible, so this is an explicit list, never a 'delete anything not in the CSV' sweep (that would take the gift card and, later, the client's real products). The makeup entries are from our own first-pass catalog, built before the brand guidelines arrived; Fazarim sells skincare/hair care/body care only. They carried `best-seller` and `new` tags, so they were surfacing on the homepage.
$menusComment: Main menu follows SRS §6.2. 'Fazarim Academy' (§6.1 — videos, guides, doctor consultations, downloads) is deliberately absent: no page exists and linking it would 404. The footer menu carries only URLs that resolve today — refund, shipping and terms policies 404 until the client publishes them (drafts in docs/policies/). Add them here at that point and re-run `npm run setup`. Never link a page that does not exist.
$targetsComment: Where theme imagery gets wired into templates/index.json. Asset keys resolve against the active assets.*.json file.
$collectionCopyComment: SRS §11.1 requires category pages to carry introductory content and editable meta descriptions. `description` renders in the collection banner; `seoDescription` becomes the meta description. Applied by `npm run setup:copy`.
